text: Last pass: add quick asserts and optimize the front removal. `pop(0)` is okay for the toy version, but call out and fix the cost.
So use collections.deque for recent events, because popleft is O(1). Keep the set in sync exactly like before.
Yes. Include tests for duplicate within window, duplicate after expiry, malformed line, and sorting ties.
I will add simple asserts below the function. No pytest, just direct checks.
Great. Also explain complexity. Then we're done.
